title: BROKEN try to filter out --tls-verify from skopeo --help
body:
Apparently that part works, but (skopeo inspect --tls-verify) doesn't show up...

Signed-off-by: Miloslav Trmač <mitr@redhat.com>

comments.body: Dropping the global `--tls-verify` option does cause the option to show up in `skopeo inspect --help`. But that’s not what we want…
